session_log.summary: Code integrity audit: no mocks/stubs found (MockProvider already removed). Fixed critical frontend build error (missing connectGitHub/disconnectGitHub exports in client.ts). All infrastructure verified healthy. 0 passing tests to regress.

Verified all 18 T0 infrastructure tests via Puppeteer and curl. All passing: backend health, frontend rendering, DB tables/indexes, CORS, API docs, provider detection, MCP server, env vars, cyberpunk theme, session middleware.
Wired 6 disconnected components: settings API+UI, provider/repo-tree API functions, PAT response shape fix, NavigatorHistory field mapping fix (was broken: stuck spinner). 1 mock data gap reported.

active_warnings.message: connectGitHub/disconnectGitHub wrappers verified working. PAT response shape fixed in session 3 (github_auth.py now returns GitHubUserInfo). connectGitHub uses submitGitHubPAT().login which works correctly.

Duplicate GitHub endpoints: github_auth.py + github.py, and duplicate pipeline endpoints: optimize.py + optimizations.py. github_repos.py registered first so its GET /api/github/repos wins (returns array, matching frontend). github.py version returns {repos:[...]} which would break frontend if registered first.

History field mapping uses fallback pattern (item.raw_prompt || item.original_prompt). If backend schema changes, ensure both field names are checked. The history store HistoryEntry interface still uses 'original_prompt' — consider renaming to 'raw_prompt' for consistency.

outstanding_mocks.pattern: Seed optimization records have provider_used='mock' from before MockProvider was removed. 4 records with hardcoded mock responses.

next_actions.action: Verify all 18 T0 tests are truly passing. Tier boundary reached — T0 complete, T1 begins next session.

Wire NavigatorFiles to GitHub repo tree/file API when a repo is selected. fetchRepoTree/fetchFileContent functions now exist in client.ts. The github store has files state and setFiles() method — connect them to show repo files in the file explorer.
Add provider status display to the UI. fetchProviderDetect/fetchProviderStatus functions now exist in client.ts. Consider showing provider health in the status bar or settings panel.

Verify settings panel wiring (NavigatorSettings.svelte → GET/PATCH /api/settings), history panel field mapping fix (NavigatorHistory.svelte), and PAT response shape fix (github_auth.py). All verified via Puppeteer screenshots.

server_state.notes: Backend using claude_cli provider. Frontend dev server on 5199. MCP running on 8001. DB at backend/data/promptforge.db with 3 tables (optimizations, github_tokens, linked_repos) and proper indexes.
